xml.raw:
<Policy>
  <Parser parser_key="{@parser_key}" type="1" separator="1,25" arr_length="34">
    <Field position="0"  name="location"         convert_tag="[[@regexGet('.*')]]" />
    <Field position="1"  name="eqp_dt"            convert_tag="[[@date('yyyy-MM-dd_HHmmss','yyyyMMddHHmmss')]]" />
    <Field position="2"  name="action" />
    <Field position="3"  name="original_ip"      org_name="orig" />
    <Field position="4"  name="ifdir" />
    <Field position="5"  name="ifname" />
    <Field position="6"  name="has_accounting"   org_name="hasaccounting" />
    <Field position="7"  name="logid" />
    <Field position="8"  name="traffic_type"     org_name="logtype" />
    <Field position="9"  name="log_seq_num"      org_name="logsequencenum" />
    <Field position="10" name="is_first_for_luuid" org_name="isfirstforluuid" />
    <Field position="11" name="version"          org_name="logversion" />
    <Field position="12" name="eqp_nm"           org_name="originsicname" />
    <Field position="13" name="product" />
    <Field position="14" name="policy_id_tag"    org_name="policyidtag" />
    <Field position="15" name="service_id"       org_name="serviceid" />
    <Field position="16" name="src_ip"            org_name="src" />
    <Field position="17" name="src_port"          org_name="sport" />
    <Field position="18" name="dstn_ip"           org_name="dst" />
    <Field position="19" name="service" />
    <Field position="20" name="prtc"              org_name="proto" />
    <Field position="21" name="match_id"         org_name="matchid" />
    <Field position="22" name="match_table_id"   org_name="matchtableid" />
    <Field position="23" name="layer_uuid"       org_name="layeruuid" />
    <Field position="24" name="match_table_layer_uuid" org_name="matchtablelayeruuid" />
    <Field position="25" name="layer_nm"         org_name="layername" />
    <Field position="26" name="match_table_layer_nm" org_name="matchtablelayername" />
    <Field position="27" name="match_table_rule_uid" org_name="matchtableruleuid" />
    <Field position="28" name="rule_nm"          org_name="rulename" />
    <Field position="29" name="match_table_rule_nm" org_name="matchtablerulename" />
    <Field position="30" name="rule_action"      org_name="ruleaction" />
    <Field position="31" name="match_table_rule_action" org_name="matchtableruleaction" />
    <Field position="32" name="parent_rule"      org_name="parentrule" />
    <Field position="33" name="match_table_parent_rule" org_name="matchtableparentrule" />
    <Field position="34" name="vendor"            convert_tag="[[@set('checkpoint')]]" />
    <Field position="35" name="original_log"     convert_tag="[[@originalLog()]]" />
    <Field position="36" name="model"             convert_tag="[[@set('quantum')]]" />
    <Field position="37" name="eqp_type"          convert_tag="[[@set('gw')]]" />
    <Field position="38" name="parser_version"    convert_tag="[[@set('v3')]]" />
    <Field position="39" name="logtype"           convert_tag="[[@set('traffic')]]" />
    <Field position="40" name="parser_info"       convert_tag="[[@set('[CheckPoint]_quantum_traffic_v3_keyvalue')]]" />
  </Parser>
</Policy>
